description: position: fixed repeated on every page (header/footer/badges), z-index ordering, and an absolute box resolving against a relative ancestor.
visual_assertions: The CONFIDENTIAL header appears at the top of every page.
The footer appears at the bottom-right of every page.
The yellow z2 badge paints on top of the blue z1 box where they overlap.
The corner tag sits at the card's top-right corner, not the page's.
Body paragraphs flow normally beneath the fixed elements.
